name: Peach Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees F.
2. Beat the cream cheese in a bowl, using an electric mixer set on medium speed, until smooth.
3. Gradually add the eggs, 1/2 cup of sugar, milk, and vanilla, beating well after each addition.
4. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pie shell.
5. Bake for 30 minutes or until set.
6. Cool on a wire rack.
7. Drain the peaches, reserving 1 cup of juice.
8. In a small saucepan, combine the cornstarch and 1/4 cup sugar.
9. Gradually stir in the reserved peach juice, lemon juice, and almond extract.
10. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture boils and thickens.
11. Remove from the heat and arrange the peaches in a circle on top of the filling.
12. Garnish with maraschino cherries.
13. Spoon the glaze over the fruit.
14. Cover and chill in the refrigerator for at least one hour or until set.
